text:
[package]
name = "just"
version = "1.55.1"
authors = ["Casey Rodarmor <casey@rodarmor.com>"]
autotests = false
categories = ["command-line-utilities", "development-tools"]
description = "🤖 Just a command runner"
edition = "2024"
exclude = ["/book", "/etc", "!/etc/completion-registration-script.bash", "/www"]
homepage = "https://github.com/casey/just"
keywords = ["command-line", "task", "runner", "development", "utility"]
license = "CC0-1.0"
readme = "etc/crates-io-readme.md"
repository = "https://github.com/casey/just"
rust-version = "1.89.0"

[workspace]
members = [".", "crates/*"]

[dependencies]
blake3 = { version = "1.5.0", features = ["mmap", "rayon", "serde"] }
camino = "1.0.4"
chrono = "0.4.38"
clap = { version = "4.0.0", features = ["derive", "env", "wrap_help"] }
clap_complete = { version = "=4.6.5", features = ["unstable-dynamic"] }
clap_mangen = "0.3.0"
digest-io = "0.1.0"
dirs = "6.0.0"
dotenvy = "0.15.0"
heck = "0.5.0"
hex = "0.4.3"
is_executable = "1.0.4"
lexiclean = "0.0.1"
libc = "0.2.0"
nu-ansi-term = "0.50.3"
num_cpus = "1.15.0"
percent-encoding = "2.3.1"
pulldown-cmark = { version = "0.13.4", default-features = false }
rand = "0.10.0"
regex = "1.10.4"
semver = "1.0.20"
serde = { version = "1.0.130", features = ["derive", "rc"] }
serde_json = "1.0.68"
sha2 = "0.11.0"
shellexpand = "3.1.0"
similar = { version = "3.0.0", features = ["unicode"] }
snafu = "0.9.0"
strsim = "0.11.1"
strum = { version = "0.28.0", features = ["derive"] }
tempfile = "3.0.0"
typed-arena = "2.0.1"
unicode-width = "0.2.0"
uuid = { version = "1.0.0", features = ["v4"] }

[target.'cfg(unix)'.dependencies]
nix = { version = "0.31.0", features = ["signal", "user", "fs"] }

[target.'cfg(windows)'.dependencies]
ctrlc = { version = "3.1.1", features = ["termination"] }

[dev-dependencies]
pretty_assertions = "1.0.0"
which = "8.0.0"

[lints.rust]
mismatched_lifetime_syntaxes = "allow"
unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = ['cfg(fuzzing)'] }
unreachable_pub = "deny"

[lints.clippy]
all = { level = "deny", priority = -1 }
arbitrary_source_item_ordering = "deny"
enum_glob_use = "allow"
format-push-string = "allow"
ignore_without_reason = "allow"
needless_pass_by_value = "allow"
pedantic = { level = "deny", priority = -1 }
self_named_constructors = "allow"
similar_names = "allow"
struct_excessive_bools = "allow"
struct_field_names = "allow"
too_many_arguments = "allow"
too_many_lines = "allow"
type_complexity = "allow"
undocumented_unsafe_blocks = "deny"
unnecessary_wraps = "allow"
wildcard_imports = "allow"

[lib]
doctest = false

[[bin]]
path = "src/main.rs"
name = "just"
test = false

# The public documentation is minimal and doesn't change between
# platforms, so we only build them for linux on docs.rs to save
# their build machines some cycles.
[package.metadata.docs.rs]
targets = ["x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"]

[profile.release]
lto = true
codegen-units = 1

[[test]]
name = "integration"
path = "tests/lib.rs"
